allow_major_version_upgrade.description: Indicates whether major version upgrades are allowed for the replication instance.

apply_immediately.description: Specifies whether the modifications should be applied immediately or during the next maintenance window.

replication_instance_class.description: The compute and memory capacity class of the replication instance.

replication_instance_id.description: A unique identifier for the replication instance.

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the resource, which can help categorize and organize resources.

timeouts.type: object({create: optional(string), update: optional(string), delete: optional(string)})
